untranslatable_reason: This is a trade frequency filter and risk philosophy statement, not a position sizing rule. It describes WHEN to trade (quality threshold, max 40 trades/year) and WHY (psychological costs, avoid missing large moves), but does NOT specify HOW to size individual positions (e.g., % risk per trade, R-multiple allocation, or scaling mechanism). Entry conditions and expectancy thresholds are filters, not sizing parameters.
